citation: Law No. 5/1999 on Prohibition of Monopolistic Practices — Article 15
summary: Promotional pricing and discount claims must not deceive consumers about actual savings or price history.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Diskon, promo, or strikethrough price claims. ACTION: WARN — verify reference price and promotion terms. CHECK: Prior selling price period and exclusions. ESCALATE IF: Misleading discount from inflated baseline price.
